course_descriptor: LazyEarn track, School of Hard Knocks entrepreneurship interviews
dynamic_book_descriptor: A thematic LazyEarn field book on entrepreneurship built from the unique School of Hard Knocks entrepreneurship interviews
dynamic_book_target: build a coherent thematic book about entrepreneurship rather than a playlist transcript dump. Keep the whole book overview in mind while each lecture is processed, and let each unique interview feed the chapters where its evidence belongs: starting, selling, capital, risk, ownership, operations, leverage, media, resilience, and judgment.
dynamic_book_style_target: write as a vivid, practical, source-conscious business book. Use concrete stories and interview evidence, but connect them into durable methods and entrepreneurial principles without motivational filler.
dynamic_book_structure_target: maintain a dynamic set of chapters organized by entrepreneurial aspect rather than video order. Reorder conservatively when a new lecture gives a clearer book arc; add new evidence into existing chapters when it strengthens an idea, and create new chapters only when the evidence opens a genuinely new entrepreneurial theme.
deliverable_target: a faithful, source-conscious chapter for Entrepreneurship, plus a per-course compiled PDF book.
visual_target: selected frames are supporting evidence for names, on-screen captions, and interview context; do not let them override the spoken content.
mathematical_standard: preserve concrete claims, business details, and any quantitative or institutional statements, but avoid invented textbook exposition. Any flowchart, table, or diagram must fit later 6x9 pocket export with 1.2x font size: wrap long labels, prefer vertical structures, and avoid wide unbreakable equations.
style_target: notes should read like a careful interview-derived companion text for entrepreneurship, wealth building, and commercial reasoning, with explicit separation between anecdote, claim, and mechanism. Each chapter should still be useful by itself, but it should also serve the overview of the whole Entrepreneurship book.
credit_target: keep explicit credit to School of Hard Knocks and curation by LazyingArt LLC; reserve the website URL for front matter, not body prose.
front_matter_single: Original interview by School of Hard Knocks. Lecture notes organized by \href{https://lazying.art}{LazyingArt LLC}.
front_matter_plural: Original interviews by School of Hard Knocks. Lecture notes organized by \href{https://lazying.art}{LazyingArt LLC}.
reference_missing_text: No directly matching reference PDF is available for this course.
reference_no_match_text: Matching course reference PDFs were found, but no strong topical excerpt was automatically matched for this interview.
reference_budget_text: Matching course reference PDFs were found, but no excerpt fit within the current prompt budget.
